name: Asparagus Mousse with Lemon Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Lb. fresh asparagus or 2 pkg. (10 oz. each, frozen)
salt and freshly ground white pepper
parsley sprigs and lemon wedge for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam asparagus in boiling salted water until barely tender.
2. Drain the cooking liquid, reserving 1/2 cup for sauce.
3. Cut asparagus into 1-inch lengths.
4. Puree the asparagus in a blender or food processor.
5. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
6. Blend the asparagus puree with eggs and seasonings.
7. Bring cream to a boil and stir in the puree.
8. Pour the mixture into a 1-quart soufflé dish or individual molds.
9. Cover with foil, punctured in several places, to let steam escape during baking.
10. Place the casserole in a larger pan filled with water in the oven.
11. Unmold and garnish with parsley and lemon.
Sauce:
12. If more than 1/2 cup asparagus liquid remains, cook it down over a double boiler.
13. Whisk egg yolks and lemon juice until the mixture is light and doubled in size.
14. Whisk into the asparagus liquid until the sauce is thick, cooking just 3 minutes to prevent curdling.
